# Reply In My Voice

Reply In My Voice provides natural, concise reply rewrites with meaning and facts preserved.

## Links

- REST API docs: https://replyinmyvoice.com/developers/api
- MCP setup: https://replyinmyvoice.com/developers/mcp
- OpenAPI schema: https://replyinmyvoice.com/api/v1/openapi.json
- Pricing: https://replyinmyvoice.com/pricing

## Facts

- REST submit endpoint: `POST /api/v1/rewrite`
- REST result endpoint: `GET /api/v1/rewrite/{id}`
- Authentication: Bearer `rmv_live_` key
- Workflow: async submit and poll
- Pro/API price: NZ$19.90/month
- Paid quota: 90 rewrites/month shared across web and API
- Free API tier: none
- Rate limit: 60 requests/minute per key
- Successful rewrites consume quota; failed jobs and polling do not.

## MCP

- Remote endpoint: `https://replyinmyvoice.com/api/mcp`
- npm package: `@replyinmyvoiceashuman/mcp-server`
- Tools: `rewrite_email`, `get_rewrite_result`
